stages.detail: The 23,732-byte typed source (SHA-256 ce6f6e73ffd41f5f6c6cf658ff41ce903b7c90afaca38a6279281d2ee8ff60e0) confirmed the imported A4, B4, C2-v2f16, metadata, selector signature. All 25 declarations canonicalized to nocallback nounwind memory(none), with selector immarg range [0,1), and without convergent. Optimization retained only 25 of 50 duplicate typed calls, so this is comparison evidence and not the selected production carrier.

stages.representation: convergent ordered kind::f8f6f4 packed-F16 inline PTX in public C, A, B, metadata, selector order
stages.detail: Pinned LLVM lowered the 18,084-byte all-forms source (SHA-256 cf0e3082d15b64340dab3480ede99adff7d8bada7b8cdfec2fa91e990562ca5e) to 8,991-byte PTX (SHA-256 fc0b67574e5ed2b3cab9a6cdd97d86cd0574c4704f35b0fb73ebaea5acbcb725) containing the exact 25-form matrix. The convergent inline duplicate fixture retained all 50 calls.

CUDA 13.3 ptxas produced a 9,728-byte cubin (SHA-256 560446ab6b41e45ca208fddc2c1439d9e851b1b67a9de920e6e81026863352b2); its 27,724-byte SASS dump (SHA-256 3c27689195cd558cd3df06db75ba6e46b1905d39e636536c0a52e01ba3323270) retains 25 unique QMMA forms. PTX 8.6, sm_120, sm_100a, selector 1, and dynamic selectors were rejected.
